title: Slab-built plant pot saucer set
notes: Set of three matching shallow saucer forms made from rolled slabs. Each saucer is a circle of clay pressed into a gentle curve over an upturned bowl or plate. Rim is smoothed and the base is kept flat so the saucer sits level. PVA sealed. Sizes: small (8 cm diameter), medium (12 cm), large (16 cm). Matched set for a windowsill plant collection.
